Class BlockingLoadBalancerClient

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.loadbalancer.blocking.client.BlockingLoadBalancerClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
LoadBalancerClient, ServiceInstanceChooser
public class BlockingLoadBalancerClient extends Object implements LoadBalancerClient
The default LoadBalancerClient implementation.
Since:
2.2.0
Author:
Olga Maciaszek-Sharma

    • BlockingLoadBalancerClient

      public BlockingLoadBalancerClient(ReactiveLoadBalancer.Factory<ServiceInstance> loadBalancerClientFactory)

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public <T> T execute(String serviceId, LoadBalancerRequest<T> request) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancerClient
      Executes request using a ServiceInstance from the LoadBalancer for the specified service.
      Specified by:
      execute in interface LoadBalancerClient
      Type Parameters:
      T - type of the response
      Parameters:
      serviceId - The service ID to look up the LoadBalancer.
      request - Allows implementations to execute pre and post actions, such as incrementing metrics.
      Returns:
      The result of the LoadBalancerRequest callback on the selected ServiceInstance.
      Throws:
      IOException - in case of IO issues.

    • execute

      public <T> T execute(String serviceId, ServiceInstance serviceInstance, LoadBalancerRequest<T> request) throws IOException
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancerClient
      Executes request using a ServiceInstance from the LoadBalancer for the specified service.
      Specified by:
      execute in interface LoadBalancerClient
      Type Parameters:
      T - type of the response
      Parameters:
      serviceId - The service ID to look up the LoadBalancer.
      serviceInstance - The service to execute the request to.
      request - Allows implementations to execute pre and post actions, such as incrementing metrics.
      Returns:
      The result of the LoadBalancerRequest callback on the selected ServiceInstance.
      Throws:
      IOException - in case of IO issues.

    • reconstructURI

      public URI reconstructURI(ServiceInstance serviceInstance, URI original)
      Description copied from interface: LoadBalancerClient
      Creates a proper URI with a real host and port for systems to utilize. Some systems use a URI with the logical service name as the host, such as http://myservice/path/to/service. This will replace the service name with the host:port from the ServiceInstance.
      Specified by:
      reconstructURI in interface LoadBalancerClient
      Parameters:
      serviceInstance - service instance to reconstruct the URI
      original - A URI with the host as a logical service name.
      Returns:
      A reconstructed URI.

    • choose

      public ServiceInstance choose(String serviceId)
      Description copied from interface: ServiceInstanceChooser
      Chooses a ServiceInstance from the LoadBalancer for the specified service.
      Specified by:
      choose in interface ServiceInstanceChooser
      Parameters:
      serviceId - The service ID to look up the LoadBalancer.
      Returns:
      A ServiceInstance that matches the serviceId.

    • choose

      public <T> ServiceInstance choose(String serviceId, Request<T> request)
      Description copied from interface: ServiceInstanceChooser
      Chooses a ServiceInstance from the LoadBalancer for the specified service and LoadBalancer request.
      Specified by:
      choose in interface ServiceInstanceChooser
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the request context.
      Parameters:
      serviceId - The service ID to look up the LoadBalancer.
      request - The request to pass on to the LoadBalancer
      Returns:
      A ServiceInstance that matches the serviceId.
